text.title: ADR Supersession Detection Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the ADR corpus have ≥10 parseable ADRs?

branch.question: Is a human reviewer available to confirm?

conclusion.verdict: run scan with default threshold + route to reviewer

example.trace: input matches `parseable_count >= 10` → sub-question → `reviewer_available == true` → conclusion ref=`evidence-overlap-threshold`.
